coverage.flow_replay: The built public manual exposes the ten bilingual release-note routes.
coverage.artifact_replay: The build contract rejects missing routes and internal corpus output.
coverage.scenario_clause_e2e: VRNH-AC-001 through VRNH-AC-007 are covered by executable assertions.
coverage.release_note: Monthly English and Japanese release-note pages are present and linked.
coverage.rollout_plan: The existing Pages workflow publishes the documentation after merge.
coverage.rollback_instruction: Revert the two release-note commits, rebuild the manual, and redeploy Pages.
coverage.observability_evidence: The docs build, ten-route contract, public discovery scan, and Pages CI expose failures.
